positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring large, detailed silhouettes of glowing flora, friendly woodland animals (like stylized deer and foxes), and gentle swirling mist. The composition is symmetrical and centered, making it ideal for a repeating pattern. Use a deep, nocturnal color palette of indigo, teal, emerald green, and pops of warm, phosphorescent yellow and coral. The style should be sophisticated, high-contrast illustration resembling woodcut etching mixed with glowing watercolor washes. Focus on clean, easily distinguishable shapes and strong negative space around the silhouettes. Perfect for screen printing on natural fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noisy, low detail, grainy, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, human, signature, graffiti, logo
